name: DLP Resources Inc.
description: DLP Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of large-scale copper and molybdenum deposits in Peru, as well as base metal projects in British Columbia, Canada. The company's flagship project is the Aurora porphyry copper-molybdenum project in southern Peru, which has demonstrated significant mineralized intercepts. DLP Resources aims to create shareholder value by leveraging its experienced management team and technical expertise to advance high-potential exploration targets in prolific mining jurisdictions, supporting the global demand for critical metals essential for the green energy transition.
